text: What are they asking one another about?
About the momentous news,
over which they disagree. <sup foot_note=1269>1269</sup>

foot_notes.1269: The pagans used to mock the teachings of the Quran (e.g., resurrection and judgment). They disagreed whether the Quran was magic, poetry, or fortune-telling.

text: But no! They will come to know.
Again, no! They will come to know.
Have We not smoothed out the earth ňĻlike a bedňļ,
and ňĻmadeňļ the mountains as ňĻitsňļ pegs, <sup foot_note=1270>1270</sup>

foot_notes.1270: Just like tent pegs and icebergs, mountains go deep below the surface, slowing tectonic movement.

text: and created you in pairs,
and made your sleep for rest,
and made the night as a cover,
and made the day for livelihood,
and built above you seven mighty ňĻheavensňļ,
and placed ňĻin themňļ a shining lamp,
and sent down from rainclouds pouring water,
producing by it grain and ňĻvariousňļ plants,
and dense orchards?
Indeed, the Day of ňĻFinalňļ Decision is an appointed time‚ÄĒ
ňĻit isňļ the Day the Trumpet will be blown, and you will ňĻallňļ come forth in crowds.
The sky will be ňĻsplitňļ open, becoming ňĻmanyňļ gates,
and the mountains will be blown away, becoming ňĻlikeňļ a mirage.
Indeed, Hell is lying in ambush
as a home for the transgressors,
where they will remain for ňĻendlessňļ ages.
There they will not taste any coolness or drink,
except boiling water and ňĻoozingňļ pus‚ÄĒ
a fitting reward.
For they never expected any reckoning,
and totally rejected Our signs.
And We have everything recorded precisely.
ňĻSo the deniers will be told,ňļ ‚ÄúTaste ňĻthe punishmentňļ, for all you will get from Us is more torment.‚ÄĚ
Indeed, the righteous will have salvation‚ÄĒ
Gardens, vineyards,
and full-bosomed maidens of equal age,
and full cups ňĻof pure wineňļ,
never to hear any idle talk or lying therein‚ÄĒ
a ňĻfittingňļ reward as a generous gift from your Lord,
the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything in between, the Most Compassionate. No one will dare speak to Him
on the Day the ňĻholyňļ spirit <sup foot_note=1271>1271</sup> and the angels will stand in ranks. None will talk, except those granted permission by the Most Compassionate and whose words are true.
That Day is the ňĻultimateňļ truth. So let whoever wills take the path leading back to their Lord.

Indeed, We have warned you of an imminent punishment‚ÄĒthe Day every person will see ňĻthe consequences ofňļ what their hands have done, and the disbelievers will cry, ‚ÄúI wish I were dust.‚ÄĚ <sup foot_note=1272>1272</sup>

foot_notes.1272: In the Hereafter, Allah will judge between all of His creation including animals, which will eventually become dust. The wicked will wish that they too were turned into dust so they do not have to go to the Fire, as reported in an authentic narration collected by Al-Šł§akim.
